query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A grayscale image showing diagonal bands of light and shadow, with a dark angular form on the left side and a lighter region extending toward the right edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grayscale abstract photograph showing diagonal bands of light and shadow with a dark angular form on the left, rendered with intentional blur that eliminates fine detail and dissolves surfaces into smeared, ambiguous textures, presenting a non-representational composition focused on tonal form.
